sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112097" key="fore/skw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φορ-έσκω</orth>, <sense id="n112097.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">φορέω, φέρω</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bring,</tr_> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οἷς] κλέος οἶδα φορέσκειν</foreign> Ramsay <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Studies in the Eastern Roman Provinces</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg006.perseus-grc1:p.128" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.128</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
